name: official_policy_obs_contract
notes: Tracking policy actor observation order is command(58), anchor pos/orientation, base twist, joint state, last action.

name: official_reward_contract
notes: Tracking reward uses Gaussian-shaped task-space terms plus action-rate, joint-limit, and contact regularizers.

name: official_reset_update_contract
notes: MotionCommand refreshes relative body targets in _update_command; reset-time stale targets are a local runtime blocker if not refreshed.

name: official_pd_action_scale_contract
notes: Action is a joint position target offset using G1_ACTION_SCALE = 0.25 * effort / stiffness.

name: paper_stage1_contract
notes: Paper Stage 1 is RL motion tracking with DeepMimic-style task-space rewards and 50 Hz policies.

name: paper_stage2_contract
notes: Paper Stage 2 requires true tracking-policy rollouts, VAE/DAgger, state-latent diffusion, and receding-horizon guidance.
